published.text:
### Hero
Heading: n8n Automation Examples for Small Business
Body: n8n is one of the most powerful automation platforms available to small businesses — but most tutorials show you toy examples that do not solve real problems. This page shows you actual n8n workflows that run in production for service businesses. Lead follow-up, CRM automation, email sequences, appointment scheduling, and more.
Sub: Below: practical n8n automation examples organized by use case, with honest guidance on complexity and what you need to get started.

### Core sections
- Lead response and follow-up workflows
- Missed call text-back
- Web form instant response
- Multi-step lead nurture sequence
- Database reactivation campaign

### FAQ
Subhead: Practical answers about n8n automation for small businesses

### Final CTA
Heading: Ready to automate the repetitive work?
Body: Book a 30-minute call. We will look at your current workflows, identify the best starting point, and show you what an n8n automation would look like for your business.

edits.description: Published as part of batch 2 of the bounded programmatic SEO rollout.
Structured for both search and AI-answer extraction with a direct answer opening, decision-oriented sections, FAQ, and proof-adjacent linking.
Commercial, practical, and grounded. No invented case-study claims.
Built to reinforce the existing consultant / industry / workflow clusters on dmytroai.com.
